command_receipts.summary: HRX API audit helper appends route audit event and fails closed without context.

test_source_receipts.proof: HRX route audit helper appends an audit event.
HRX route audit helper fails closed without audit context.
Matter opening write test asserts persistence, audit, and idempotent replay.
Matter list view write test asserts saved audit event.
Matter document/builder audit event excludes raw body.
Matter activity/calendar/channel audit event excludes raw body.
HRX approval POST path records audit.
Permission admin patch audit event excludes raw policy json.
